mapper.select: SELECT category_no AS "categoryNo", name AS "name" FROM CATEGORY_SPACE ORDER BY category_no ASC
SELECT option_no AS "optionNo", type AS "type", name AS "name", icon_url AS "iconUrl" FROM SPACE_OPTION ORDER BY option_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPACE_IMAGE (image_no, space_no, file_url) VALUES (SEQ_SPACE_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{spaceNo}, #{fileUrl})
INSERT INTO SELECTED_SPACE_OPTION (sso_no, option_no, unit_no) VALUES (SEQ_SELECTED_SPACE_OPTION.NEXTVAL, #{optionNo}, #{unitNo})

INSERT INTO SPACE_UNIT (unit_no, space_no, title, price_per_hour, max_capacity, description, thumbnail_url) VALUES (#{unitNo}, #{spaceNo}, #{title}, #{pricePerHour}, #{maxCapacity}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl})
INSERT INTO SPACE_POLICY (policy_no, unit_no, min_hours, cancel_limit_hr, cleaning_fee) VALUES (SEQ_SPACE_POLICY.NEXTVAL, #{unitNo}, #{minHour}, #{cancelLimitHr}, #{cleaningFee})
INSERT INTO SPACE_UNIT_TIME (unit_time_no, unit_no, day_of_week, open_time, close_time) VALUES (SEQ_SPACE_UNIT_TIME.NEXTVAL, #{unitNo}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime})
INSERT INTO SPACE_APPROVAL (approval_no, space_no, status) VALUES (SEQ_SPACE_APPROVAL.NEXTVAL, #{spaceNo}, 'PENDING')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SELECTED_SPACE_OPTION WHERE unit_no IN (SELECT unit_no FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo})
DELETE FROM SPACE_UNIT_TIME WHERE unit_no IN (SELECT unit_no FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo})
DELETE FROM SPACE_POLICY WHERE unit_no IN (SELECT unit_no FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE SPACE SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo}
mapper.select: SELECT space_no AS spaceNo, host_id AS hostId, category_no AS categoryNo, space_name AS spaceName, biz_reg_num AS bizRegNum, address, detail_addr AS detailAddr, region, bank_name AS bankName, account_no AS accountNo, account_holder AS accountHolder, space_intro AS spaceIntro, space_guide AS spaceGuide, status FROM SPACE WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT image_no AS imageNo, space_no AS spaceNo, file_url AS fileUrl FROM SPACE_IMAGE WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo}
SELECT image_no AS imageNo, space_no AS spaceNo, file_url AS fileUrl FROM SPACE_IMAGE WHERE image_no = #{imageNo}
SELECT DISTINCT option_no FROM SELECTED_SPACE_OPTION WHERE unit_no IN (SELECT unit_no FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo})

SELECT u.unit_no AS unitNo, u.title, u.price_per_hour AS pricePerHour, u.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, u.description, u.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, p.min_hours AS minHour, p.cancel_limit_hr AS cancelLimitHr, p.cleaning_fee AS cleaningFee FROM SPACE_UNIT u LEFT JOIN SPACE_POLICY p ON u.unit_no = p.unit_no WHERE u.space_no = #{spaceNo} ORDER BY u.unit_no ASC
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM SPACE WHERE host_id = #{hostId} AND status != 'DELETED'

SELECT s.space_no AS spaceNo, s.space_name AS spaceName, s.space_intro AS spaceIntro, s.region AS region, s.status AS status, s.is_premium AS isPremium,
(SELECT MAX(max_capacity) FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE space_no = s.space_no) AS maxCapacity,
(SELECT file_url FROM SPACE_IMAGE WHERE space_no = s.space_no ORDER BY image_no ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS fileUrl
FROM SPACE s WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId} AND s.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY s.space_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE SPACE SET is_premium = #{isPremium} WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPACE_PREMIUM (premium_no, space_no, host_id, status, applied_at) VALUES (SEQ_SPACE_PREMIUM.NEXTVAL, #{spaceNo}, #{hostId}, #{status}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE SPACE_PREMIUM SET status = #{status}, canceled_at = SYSDATE WHERE space_no = #{spaceNo} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'ACTIVE')
